title: Pioneering zk-rollup Loopring closes DEX, citing lack of adoption
summary: “We lacked a virtual machine, no composability, no real‑world payment use cases. That limitation kept our ecosystem from growing,” said the team.

title: Ether treasury Sharplink bought $62.4M ETH last week
summary: Sharplink bought nearly 40,000 ETH last week after an eight-month pause, adding to signs the company has resumed its Ether accumulation strategy.

title: PBOC Unexpectedly Withholds Rate on New Overnight Operation
summary: China’s central bank held its debut overnight operation but didn’t disclose the rate of interest it charged commercial lenders, in a surprise move to traders awaiting guidance on borrowing costs.

title: Markets Are Buying Into Less Uncertainty: Capital.com
summary: Kyle Rodda of Capital.com shares his views on the de-dollarization trade and market volatility. He says it shouldn't be understated "how significant it is that the United States is inviting Iran, effectively, back into global trade, selling its oil into global markets." (Source: Bloomberg)
